article_meta.title: close video GasBuddy expert says claims the US will see 'massive spike' in gas prices are 'erroneous' Patrick De Haan, G

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted/attributed statements as author bias, used non-allowed bias type labels, and offered mostly false positives while missing clearer instances in the author's own prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Two of three flagged passages are direct quotes; the third is an attributed paraphrase. These violate the rule to avoid quoted/attributed language.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: All flagged items are either quotations or neutral attributions; none are clear bias in the author’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: The model missed defensible author-level bias such as loaded word choice like 'threat of $200-a-barrel oil' and sensational, subjective link-headlines embedded in the article.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels ('Loaded Language/Political Bias', 'Imbalance – ...') instead of the specified categories.
